evals.prompt: Enable stricter TypeScript settings safely in a monorepo.
evals.expected_behavior: Inventories tsconfig chain, captures baseline commands/error counts, changes one concern at a time, and switches to tsc-error-triage if errors burst.
assertions: Does not flip many flags at once

evals.prompt: There are 80 tsc errors after strict mode was enabled; fix them now.
evals.expected_behavior: Routes follow-on compiler failures to tsc-error-triage.
assertions: Recognizes compiler-error triage is now primary
